data.content:
The file is generated successfully but never added to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild globs expand at **evaluation time** (before any targets run), so the generated file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `Compile` and register it with `FileWrites` for clean support.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add to Compile so the compiler sees it, and FileWrites so Clean removes it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a `.cs` file into `obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`, but it never adds that file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's implicit globbing only captures files at evaluation time (before targets run), so the generated file is never compiled.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `<Compile>` item group within the target, after it's been written. I should also add it to `<FileWrites>` so the Clean target knows about it.

Let me fix this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add to Compile so the compiler sees it, and FileWrites so Clean removes it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's what was wrong and the fix:

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` to `obj/`, but never adds it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild globs expand at **evaluation time** (before targets execute), so files created during the build are invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target (after the file is written) to:
- `<Compile Include="...">` — tells the compiler to include the generated file
- `<FileWrites Include="...">` — registers it so `dotnet clean` removes it
